intent.userRequest: Plan structural fix for ecosystem state.json drift detected across 8 of 12 BCOS-enabled repos.
intent.objective: Eliminate the recurring 'state.json out of sync with disk' findings produced on every architecture-review run by replacing additive-merge logic with disk-scan regeneration, fixing audit-time inconsistencies, and adding an auto-fix path.

relevantLessons: L-INIT-20260404-009: Discovery scripts are the source of truth for what exists. State files record what discovery found, not the definition itself. — DIRECTLY supports the proposed fix
L-INIT-20260404-002: Context rot is the natural state. Without active maintenance, all business context degrades over time. — applies to state.json as a maintenance concern

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: Confirmed dev repo has skill-discovery/agent-discovery as utility dirs (no SKILL.md/AGENT.md). Lesson L-INIT-20260404-009 directly supports approach.

steps.name: Detect Scenario
steps.result: AGENTING — touches scripts, skill job references, auto-fix policy, schedule template

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: Investigation phase completed before clear-planner invocation. update.py merge_ecosystem_state, analyze_integration.py classify_file marker rule, schedule-dispatcher job structure all read.

steps.name: Load Scenario Template
steps.result: AGENTING template — Discovery, Design, Implementation, Integration Audit (FIXED END), Ecosystem State, Learnings Capture

steps.name: Present Full Plan
steps.result: User chose Approve — handoff to implementation
